_comment: Named zones in the turtlebot3_house map, captured via RViz 'Publish Point' in the map frame. yaw defaults to 0.0 since Publish Point does not capture orientation -- update manually via '2D Pose Estimate' if specific facing directions matter for the demo.

spawn_corner.description: room corner where the robot spawns

small_room_junction.description: small room at the L intersection just past the spawn room

main_hall.description: main hall with the entrance corridor

big_room_east.description: bigger room at the other L intersection

nested_room.description: nested room before the bigger hall

far_hall.description: bigger hall at the far L, before the opposite corner room
